betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Unified Networks: The Storage Scanner§f

§aIndex and access every inventory in your base from a single centralized console!§f

If you have scattered chests, crates, and storage drawers, the §bStorage Scanner§f can bind them into a single virtual network.

§6Scanner Capabilities§f:
§b• Network Integration§f: Scans and indexes up to §e20 blocks§f in a radius around it. It can read vanilla chests, iron chests, §bModular Storage§f blocks, and §bStorage Drawer Controllers§f.
§b• RF Capacity§f: Stores up to §e50,000 RF§f, receiving energy at §e500 RF/tick§f.
§b• Search & Request§f: Open the Scanner's GUI to search across all connected inventories. Double-click an item to request it.
§b• Inventory Routing§f: By default, requested items are §arouted straight into your player inventory§f rather than an output slot, keeping item retrieval seamless.

§6Automation & Energy Costs§f:
Interacting with the scanner draws power from its internal buffer:
§b• Insertion Cost§f: Consumes §e20 RF§f per item inserted.
§b• Request Cost§f: Consumes §e100 RF§f per item requested.

§eNote§f: You can hook up cables (like §bXNet§f or §bThermal Dynamics§f) directly to the Storage Scanner to automate inserting and extracting items from the entire scanned network!
